commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh As for me, this is my covenant with them, says the LORD; My spirit that is upon you, and my words which I have put in your mouth, shall not depart out of your mouth, nor out of the mouth of your descendants, nor out of the mouth of your descendant's descendants, says the LORD, from this time forth and forever. Note here a clear promise of perpetual orthodoxy to the Church of Christ. (Challoner) She hath still the spirit of truth. (Worthington) (Matthew xxviii. ) None will apply this to the synagogue, which is visibly in the dark, and abandoned.
